reason: Bitcoin was rejected after a short-lived jump to $74,000, with buyers quickly cashing out, indicating significant selling pressure and a failure to sustain higher prices. This is compounded by escalating geopolitical tensions (Iran) driving risk assets lower, unexpectedly weak U.S. job data signaling economic slowdown, and broad market weakness across all CoinDesk 20 constituents. Regulatory scrutiny on Binance adds to the overall risk-off sentiment, suggesting further downside potential and high volatility.
headlines: Bitcoin buyers are cashing out fast after short-lived jump to $74,000
Binance tells Senate probe no accounts sent crypto directly to Iran
'No deal with Iran': Trump demands unconditional surrender, sending oil surging, bitcoin and stocks lower
CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aave drops 4.3% as all index constituents trade lower
U.S. unexpectedly lost 92,000 jobs in February, unemployment rate rose to 4.4%
